name: andrewmaston1988-claude-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins by Andrew Maston

plugins.name: slack-bridge
plugins.description: Two-way Slack ↔ Claude Code bridge via Socket Mode

plugins.name: pipeline
plugins.description: Pipeline orchestration — queue plans, autonomous dev/test/review sessions, merge runner, TUI + web dashboards, spend governance

plugins.name: agent-investigation
plugins.description: Investigate agent transcripts and subagent investigation tooling

plugins.name: checkpoint
plugins.description: Durable cross-session handoff via STATE.md, /checkpoint skill, SessionStart resume offer, PreCompact backstop, and an observable self-correcting cache-keepalive.

plugins.name: swarm
plugins.description: Alternative-model fan-out engine — manifest-driven parallel runs across capable :cloud models and Claude, with digest compression and worktree isolation
